title: Client Product license tracking
excerpt: Before I go off and try to build something I thought I woudl check and make sure it does not already exist. My team does consulting to our customers base. Our customers have licenses for different applications within our…

posts.author: Brice (Brice Nickelsen)
posts.cookedHtml: Before I go off and try to build something I thought I woudl check and make sure it does not already exist. My team does consulting to our customers base. Our customers have licenses for different applications within our main product. I would like to have a view that shows what apps and how many “seats” a customer has of those apps. Is there something out there already?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Brice and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I don’t remember seeing any app doing that.

Having said that, I recommend going trough the apps in the marketplace to check.

Cheers,
-Matias
